description_long: This is a modern laptop with a slim, rectangular design and a metallic gray finish. The device features a large black screen, a full-sized keyboard with a QWERTY layout, and a spacious touchpad centered below the keyboard. On the palm rest area, there are two visible stickers: one circular and one rectangular yellow sticker with text, adding a touch of personalization. The laptop lid displays a simple geometric logo in the center, consisting of a house-like icon. The overall build appears sturdy, with a hard, smooth surface and minimal visible ports or external features.
description: A sleek gray laptop with a black screen, full keyboard, and two stickers on the palm rest. The lid features a geometric logo.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black screen, full keyboard, touchpad, and two stickers on the palm rest.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the laptop's slim profile and the yellow sticker on the palm rest.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the closed lid with a centered geometric logo and no visible ports.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the laptop's thinness and the placement of the stickers on the palm rest.
attribute_brand_logo: A geometric house-like logo is visible in the center of the laptop lid, consisting of a square with a triangle roof and a small square window.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and turned off, with no visible content displayed.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout with a function row and standard keys; no numeric keypad is visible.
attribute_sticker_placement: Two stickers are present on the palm rest area: a circular sticker on the left and a rectangular yellow sticker with text on the right, near the touchpad.
